insurance_h2: Most PPO Plans Cover the Majority of Treatment Costs

insurance_body_p2: Amity Palm Beach works with Aetna, BCBS Florida, Cigna, UnitedHealthcare, Anthem, UMR, GEHA, and most major PPO plans. We'll verify your exact benefits at no charge — call (888) 664-0182.

hero_h1: BCBS Florida Rehab Coverage — Check Your Benefits
hero_paragraph: Blue Cross Blue Shield of Florida is one of the state's largest insurance carriers — and most BCBS Florida PPO plans include meaningful coverage for addiction treatment. Amity Palm Beach verifies your specific benefits at no charge before admission.
insurance_h2: Most BCBS Florida Plans Cover Addiction Treatment
insurance_body_p1: Blue Cross Blue Shield of Florida PPO plans are among the most comprehensive in the state for behavioral health coverage. Detox and residential treatment are typically covered as medically necessary services.
insurance_body_p2: Our team verifies BCBS Florida benefits every day. Call (888) 664-0182 and we'll confirm your deductible, out-of-pocket maximum, and covered length of stay before you commit to anything.
insurance_h2_2: Let Us Verify Your BCBS Coverage
insurance_body_2: Navigating insurance benefits is confusing. Our admissions team contacts BCBS Florida directly, asks the right clinical questions, and comes back to you with a plain-language explanation of what your plan covers and what you'll owe.
break_h2: Your Benefits Are Probably Better Than You Think
break_body: Many BCBS Florida members are surprised by how much their plan covers. Don't assume treatment is out of reach — call us, let us check, and we'll tell you exactly what you're working with.
treatment_h2: What BCBS Florida Typically Covers
treatment_card1_body: BCBS Florida PPO plans typically cover medically supervised detox as an acute medical service.
treatment_card2_body: Inpatient residential care is commonly covered under BCBS Florida plans based on clinical necessity and plan specifics.
treatment_card3_body: Co-occurring mental health conditions are covered alongside addiction treatment under BCBS Florida's behavioral health benefits.
form_body: Fill out the form with your BCBS Florida insurance information and our team will verify your benefits and call you back with a clear breakdown. Free and confidential.
